features: 🌱 Biotin, Keratin & Collagen Blend – Strengthens, repairs, and nourishes from root to tip.
Deep Conditioning Treatment – Restores moisture and smoothness to dry, damaged, and chemically treated hair.
✨ Shine & Elasticity Boost – Improves softness, shine, and flexibility while reducing frizz and split ends.
🌿 Vegan & Clean Formula – Free from sulfates, parabens, and harsh chemicals; cruelty-free and eco-friendly.
✅ Salon-Quality Results at Home – Suitable for all hair types: straight, curly, wavy, coily, and color-treated.
description: Product description 🌱 Powerful Repair & Strengthening – Enriched with Biotin, Keratin, and Collagen to deeply nourish, repair damage, and restore hair vitality. 💆‍♀️ Deep Hydration & Softness – Intensely moisturizes dry and brittle strands, leaving hair silky, smooth, and manageable. ✨ Boosts Shine & Elasticity – Restores natural shine and resilience while reducing breakage and split ends. 🌿 Vegan & Clean Formula – 100% vegan, cruelty-free, and free from sulfates, parabens, and harsh chemicals. ✅ Professional Salon Quality – Ideal for all hair types, including color-treated and chemically processed hair. Revitalize your hair with the RENEW HAIR PROFESSIONAL RenewPlex Hair Mask, a luxurious treatment crafted with Biotin, Keratin, and Collagen to restore strength, shine, and softness. Specially designed for dry, damaged, and chemically treated hair, this intensive mask penetrates deep into each strand to deliver lasting hydration and repair. Biotin helps support stronger, healthier growth, while Keratin smooths and fortifies the hair’s natural structure, reducing breakage and frizz. Collagen works to improve elasticity and resilience, leaving your hair looking fuller, shinier, and more youthful. Unlike heavy treatments that weigh hair down, RenewPlex has a lightweight yet rich formula that deeply nourishes without leaving buildup. Safe for daily or weekly use, it’s suitable for all hair types—including straight, wavy, curly, and coily textures. Formulated with care, this vegan and cruelty-free hair mask contains no sulfates, parabens, or harsh chemicals—making it gentle on both your hair and the planet. Pamper your hair with professional salon-quality results at home. With every use, RenewPlex transforms dull, brittle strands into smooth, silky, and radiant locks. ✨ Experience the power of Biotin, Keratin, and Collagen—because your hair deserves nothing less. Ingredients Biotin – Helps support stronger, thicker-looking hair. Keratin – Smooths, repairs, and protects hair structure. Collagen – Improves elasticity, resilience, and shine. Directions After shampooing, apply a generous amount to damp hair, focusing on the mid-lengths and ends. Leave on for 5-10 minutes, then rinse thoroughly. For best results, use 1-2 times a week. Suitable for all hair types. Safety Warning For External use only.Avoid contact with eyes. if the products touch the eyes, rinse abundant with water See more
